name: VerifyAI
description: Trustless content integrity checker — plagiarism detection and AI-writing detection settled by AI validator consensus.
notes: deployTx is null: the contract was deployed via the GenLayer CLI and the deployment transaction hash was not recorded at the time. The contract address is authoritative and verifiable on the block explorer.
The address above is the single source of truth used by the frontend; it is defined in frontend/src/lib/clients.ts and imported by every call site.
